title: cirsium × jouffroyi
intro: Cirsium × jouffroyi, also known as Jouffroy's thistle, is a hybrid plant species within the thistle family (Asteraceae) and is a cross between Cirsium pannonicum and Cirsium vulgare. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Cirsium × jouffroyi has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and ulcers.
